entries.name: geofencing-immutability-reconcile
entries.purpose: Hourly at :05: verify no geofence_checks row has more than one audit event. Any drift = immutability violation — raises critical alert.

entries.name: geofencing-purge-stale
entries.purpose: Daily 04:00 UTC: soft-delete + anonymise rows past retention. Small batches of 1000.
